bc547.name: BC547 NPN Bipolar Junction Transistor (TO-92)
bc547.description: General purpose small-signal NPN transistor. Highly used for switching and amplification in labs.
bc547.ascii_art:
[1mBC547 TO-92 Front View[0m
                  (Flat Face)
                  .---------.
                 /   [1mBC547[0m   \
                |  [1mC[0m   [1mB[0m   [1mE[0m  |
                |  |   |   |  |
                |  |   |   |  |
                   1   2   3
                   
                Pin 1: [36mCollector[0m
                Pin 2: [36mBase[0m
                Pin 3: [36mEmitter[0m

irf540n.name: IRF540N N-Channel Power MOSFET (TO-220)
irf540n.description: High-current N-Channel Power MOSFET (100V, 33A). Used for switching high power loads from logic pins.
irf540n.ascii_art:
[1mIRF540N TO-220 Front View[0m
                  +------------+
                  |  [ Metal ] |
                  |  [ Tab   ] |
                  |------------|
                  |  [1mIRF540N[0m   |
                  |  [1mG[0m   [1mD[0m   [1mS[0m |
                  |  |   |   | |
                     1   2   3
                     
                Pin 1: [36mGate[0m (Trigger)
                Pin 2: [36mDrain[0m (Connected to Load V-)
                Pin 3: [36mSource[0m (Connected to System GND)

hcsr04.name: HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Distance Sensor Module
hcsr04.description: Non-contact ultrasonic range measurement module (2cm to 400cm range). Uses sonic pulses and echoes.
hcsr04.ascii_art:
[1mHC-SR04 Front & Connector View[0m
               +---------------------------------+
               |   [ Transmitter ]   [ Receiver ]|
               |       (T)               (R)     |
               +---------------===---------------+
                               |||
                               1234
                               
                   Pin 1: [31mVCC[0m (+5V DC Input)
                   Pin 2: [36mTRIG[0m (Trigger Input: 10us High pulse starts ping)
                   Pin 3: [36mECHO[0m (Echo Output: Duration of High signal = flight time)
                   Pin 4: [1mGND[0m (System Ground)

dht11.name: DHT11/DHT22 Temperature & Humidity Sensor
dht11.description: Digital humidity and temperature sensor. Highly used in smart building or agricultural lab setups.
dht11.ascii_art:
[1mDHT11 / DHT22 (Pins Facing You)[0m
                     .---------------.
                    | [][][][][][][] |
                    | [][][][][][][] |
                    | [][][][][][][] |
                    |                |
                    '----------------'
                       |   |   |   |
                       1   2   3   4
                       
                   Pin 1: [31mVCC[0m (3.3V to 5.5V Power)
                   Pin 2: [36mDATA[0m (Single-bus bidirectional data link)
                   Pin 3: [1mNC[0m (No Connect - Leave empty)
                   Pin 4: [1mGND[0m (System Ground)
